panels.caption: FusionZoo never calls to say hi.
panels.continuity_notes: Street matches Emo ref #973 backdrop; billboard = Ed.4 signage

panels.dialogue: STATIC: "Danger level: four." / TWOTONE: "Of five?" / STATIC: "Of four."
panels.continuity_notes: STARTS running joke: Static's danger meter

panels.caption: The Annex is where the truth lives. The marketing lives out front.
panels.continuity_notes: Annex established Ed.2; deliberate Ed.4 corridor-reflection echo

panels.dialogue: NEONBLUE: "A free update! That's basically a gift." / ASH: "Gifts knock."
panels.continuity_notes: Ad-copy joke continues; Ash <=4 words rule
Arc positioning: Ed.4 he hesitated at a door, now he leads
Corridor = Ed.4 facility design, aged/disused variant
ZOMBIE FACTION ON-PAGE DEBUT — resolves Ed.4 teaser

panels.caption: Not everyone walks away. Some monkeys just… stayed.
panels.continuity_notes: Caption pays off Ed.4 rear-cover line verbatim

panels.caption: They never stopped fusing. There was always one more upgrade.
panels.continuity_notes: Cracked chamber = Ed.4 teaser image, now located: Chamber 0
NEW CHARACTER Patch; smile-drop wind-up, not the drop

panels.caption: Patch went in with NeonBlue, years ago. Only one of them came back out.
panels.continuity_notes: Backstory consistent with Ed.4 insecurity; logged as new lore

panels.dialogue: PATCH: "You… stopped?" / NEONBLUE: "I— I took a break. Breaks are self-care."
panels.continuity_notes: Running joke bent into pathos
Auto-protocol is PRESSURE not physics — nobody on platform, cannot commit (world bible rule 1)

panels.caption: Last time, he screamed. This time he just knew where the button was.
panels.continuity_notes: Direct arc payoff of Ed.4; abort-during-sync canon since Ed.4

panels.dialogue: THE STAYED: "more…" / SCARLINE: "You can't unplug appetite."
panels.continuity_notes: Scarline speech law: one clear sentence, once
Ed.4 closing exchange inverted; door-open = new open thread

panels.caption: Choice is the upgrade.
panels.continuity_notes: Caption = Ed.4 closing thesis paid forward; PATCH AT THRESHOLD = open thread

panels.dialogue: ASH: "Loud in there." / STATIC: "Danger level: zero. …One."
panels.continuity_notes: Squad exits unchanged and by choice — franchise voice

panels.caption: Someone else got the recall notice too.
panels.continuity_notes: NEW OPEN THREAD -> next issue: Super faction

panels.continuity_notes: Ear-cup listening beat (headphones removed from canon, ERR-2026-07-06); Patch squad-adjacent resolves Issue 05 threshold; cameo keeps Super teaser warm

panels.caption: FusionZoo shut the old network down years ago. Someone forgot to tell the network.
panels.continuity_notes: NEW LORE — the Signal, first appearance

panels.dialogue: NEONBLUE: "It's a distress call. Someone needs us!" / TWOTONE: "It repeats. It's a loop."
panels.continuity_notes: Idea beats: NeonBlue believes rescue; TwoTone hears structure
Idea beat: Emo(→Moodz) thinks trap

panels.dialogue: PATCH: "…home frequency." / NEONBLUE: "The what? Patch — the WHAT?"
panels.caption: Patch doesn't explain things. Mostly, he doesn't know how anymore.
panels.continuity_notes: Idea beat: Patch recognizes, won't explain; HOW stays unrevealed

panels.caption: The Old Quarter. Zoo City's first draft. The city never tore it down. It just stopped looking.
panels.continuity_notes: NEW LORE — Old Quarter first appearance
Danger meter continues; Ash ≤4 words
NEW LORE — Relay 1 interior; console = Ed.4 tech one generation older

panels.caption: Modern fusion is all-or-nothing. The machines guarantee it now. / These are from before the guarantee.
panels.continuity_notes: NEW LORE — the Pending. Tech grounding: nft_fusion_reference.md §5 (atomicity is modern; prototypes predate it)

panels.caption: They've been asking since the experiments ended. Thirteen years. Same question.
panels.continuity_notes: The Pending speak normally (unlike the Stayed's chant) — unresolved, not degraded

panels.dialogue: NEONBLUE: "We can get help — there are new machines, they could finish—" / PENDING: "Don't. Touch. The state."
panels.continuity_notes: Consent theme; 'the state' is literal singleton-state language (nft_fusion_reference.md §4)
HOW Patch knows Relay 1 = deliberately unanswered; do not foreshadow in art
NEW LORE — the Keeper (unseen); DAY 4,749 ≈ 13 years; open thread: who keeps the vigil

panels.dialogue: MOODZ: "Then what do you want?" / THE PENDING (together, small): "Company."
panels.continuity_notes: Moodz growth panel — asks calmly what he once screamed; consent thesis continuity Ed.4→05→06

panels.caption: Some rescues are just visits.
panels.continuity_notes: Static grounding pose canon since Ed.4; visual rule: attention stabilizes the Pending

panels.dialogue: SCARLINE: "Leaving isn't abandoning if you come back."
panels.continuity_notes: Scarline's ONE line; thesis line; squad's standing return-promise → ledger
PROP CONTINUITY: recall notice carried since Issue 05 P08_PANEL02; Patch gives the waiting what worked on him

panels.dialogue: ASH: "They waved." / STATIC: "Danger level: one. The good kind."
panels.continuity_notes: Danger meter third beat; return-promise now canon

panels.caption: It was never calling for help. It was calling something back.
panels.continuity_notes: NEW OPEN THREAD — Return Protocol; WHAT answers stays unrevealed; rear cover echoes with second light

advisories: cover image is absent; Release owns the blocking cover-deliverable requirement
